titleStmt.title: SII 22.41: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 41. (A.R. No. 41 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. RĀJARĀJADĒVA II—14th YEAR, 336th DAY (A.D. 1159-60)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pūmaruviya poḻilēḻum etc. It records an endowment of land made tax-free, as archanābhōga for the worship of god Rājarājīśvaram-Uḍaiyār consecrated in the temple, by one Sōmattiyaṉ Kalaiyaṉ Śēndaṉ for securing the well-being of the king's person, the mahā-sabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr making itself responsible for the payment of kuḍimai, kaḍamai and other dues to the palace. It is signed at the end by no less than 65 persons, who were members of the assembly. Further gifts of lands are recorded in continuation of the above made for the same purpose by (1) the mahāsabhā of Pāṇḍikulāśani-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the south of Tirukkaḍavūr, represented by 15 signatories (2) certain residents of the place who had their jīvitam at Tirukkaḍavūr, like the kaṇkāṇiśeyvār, the kaināyakam-śeyvār and the paḍaittalaivar who gave lands as kāśukoḷḷā-iṟaiyili for offerings to the deity during one service. These are represented by about 30 signatories at the end (3) the Śāliyanagarattār of Anantamaṅgalam alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻapuram in Kuṟumbūr-nāḍu who alienated 6 mā of land in favour of the same deity for being reclaimed (with 1 mā as a flower-garden), and agreed to pay the kaḍamai and kuḍimai thereof for a consideration of 37 kāśu received by them from the temple this is signed by 28 persons, and (4) the vyāpāranagarattār of the same place who gave 7 mā and odd of land as archanābhōga, and in return for 18 kāśu paid to them by the temple agreed to pay all the taxes thereon. This is attested by 14 signatories. This document is said to be got engraved on the walls of the Kālakāladēvar temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pū maruviya poḻileḻum poruppeḻu puṉainittilat tāma neṭuṅkuṭai poḻintat tavaḷa veṇṇilā kuḷira potiyaccu palataṉa yuñ ceṅkolu manaittuyiṟkuṅ kāval pūṇap paṇiyaṇaimicaip parañcoti tāḷeṉa maṇmaṭantaiyaik kaippiṭittu malarmaṭantai maṇiyār varaimārpiṟ kuṭivāḻak kulamaṭantai komuṉṉākip pormaṭantaiyai maṇampu—
ṇarntu paruti mutaṟkulam viḷaṅkic curutikaḷiṉta ḻutti paḻantāṟu camaiyattai miḷaveṭut tātiulakaṅ koḻuntu viṭṭut taḻaittoṅka koṭātaṟaṅ kuḷirtūṅka pārivā ḷañcurakkat tāraṇi me nāṉmaṟaiyor toḻil vaḷara yellārun taṉittaṉiye vāḻntaṉa miyāmeṉa Oruvaruṭaṉ Oruvaṟkum On nṟiṟkum varu pakaivaṉ ta viḻaintu kātaluṭcer Intiraṉ mutaṟ ṟicāpāla reṇmarum Oru vaṭivāki vantavaṭiveṉa niṉṟu maṉuvāṇai taṉi naṭātti kaliyāṉaiye piṇi—
ppuṇpaṉa maṇiccilampe yaraṟṟuvaṉace ṭuppaṭuvaṉa māmalare kaṭiyavāyiṉa varupuṉale ciṟaippaṭuvaṉa kāvukaḷe koṭiyavāyiṉa kaḷḷuṇpaṉa vaṇṭukaḷe pārmalivaṉa veḻukaḻaṉiye maiyyuṭaiyaṉa neṭuvaraiye maruḷuṭaiyaṉa Iṉ me piṟattoḻukuṅ kaittāyare kaṭintoṟup pāriyaṟ pulavare poruḷ veḻppā ricaippāṇare kūṭṭañ ceyvāreṉṟu kūṟi Ivaṉ kākkuṉ tirunāṭṭiniyalvituveṉa ninṟu kāval neṟi pūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉaiyātu taṉ—
taiyilor tantaiyāyun tāyarilor tāyarāyum maintarilor maintarāyu miṉṉuyirkaṭkuyirāyum viḻipeṟṟa payanenṉavum meypeṟṟa Aruḷeṉṉavum Ettalaikku miṟaivanenṉavum yāñ ceyta peruntavamenṉavum talaivanenṉavum muṉ nenṉavum Araciyaṟkai niṟainiṟutti yallavai kaṭintāṟuyattip porukaliyin Iruḷ nikkip pukaḻḻenṉum nilāp parappik kaṉṉaṭaruṅ kāliṅkarum teṉṉavaruñ ciṅkaḷarum
kaiykayarum koṅkaṇarum kaṟpakarum kācaparum kāmpotarum kocalarum kontaḷarum pappararum pāñcālarum poppaḷarum pūluvarum mattara nāṭṭarum vattavarum māṟṟava lavantaṇṭi Iṭutiṟaikaḷ ḷeṉekkoṭiyāl Iyaṟ pāvalare Eriyavakaṟṟi karumāmukil tiruniṟattu kaṉakakkaḷiṟu rājaṉ tirumārpilun tiruttoḷilum tirumaṉattilum piriyātu manattārak kuḻaliyaṟkor makuṭa cūṭāmaṇi nañcintāmaṇi hāraṟantilatacoḷakula
mpūmakaḷilum jayamakaḷilum pukaḻmakaḷilun nāmakaḷilun talaittevi nā ṟkivaḷenṉa yārācar perunteviyar pallāṇṭenṟaṭi poṟṟa peraracu taṉi naṭāttip peṇṇaracāy muṭicū Uṭanciṟappum kaṭanā paṭaittaruḷi Aṟampurakkuṅ karuṇaivalli Ivaṉvayaṟ pacumpuravi kaṭavu ṭā kaṭavivarum tavaṉ kulattu Ulakantoḻa vantaruḷiya canti(ra)rotaiyam nāṇmutaṟ kuṇanānkum nalloḻukkamum peruṅkaṟpum peṇumayil rājarājan piriyāveḷaikkāṟi Akila loka mātar ṉaiṅka—
ḷorunānkum pukala varutanināyaka puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷum Akkāmak kaliya palar ḻaipoḻi kuḷirmati veṇkuṭai cakkaravatti jeṉanātan taraṇipālan taṉ nāyaki Ālaṅkal malaṟcolaiyil Āluṅkaḷiya vanta māruḷḷil Oru pāṟ kaṭalil viḷaiyāṭum peṭaiy naṉmalaiyāyaṭaitta cilaintal mayil pukavoru cunta paṭaitta nānmukatton perumpaṭappai vaḷarkkum piṇi vaiyya mettum camantakamaṇi māṉatana puṉaika putuvamaṇ taiyalāṟkoru cūḷāmaṇi cakateva cintāmaṇi lai ko—
ṇṭu pukaḻeṟun maṇipuṉaintu peṇṇiya pavutaṉ piṟantatenṉa ṇimanṉavartan teviyar ninvaḻiyaṭiyom Aṭiyomeṉa muṉṉinṟu toḻutetta mutalmai peṟṟamul nāṭṭi Iṉam poḻiya virarājarājan yāṉaiyoṭu terka ṉanpoḻiyum rājarājanāy veḷai taritta poṟkoṭi Icai muḻutum koṭai muḻutum Eḻil muḻutum ticaimuḻutum maṇmuḻutum tirumuḻutum Uṭaiyaḷāki munṉa muḻutulakuyya muṭicūṭum rājapaṇṭitan tanṉai muḻutuṭaiya tevi taraṇi muḻutuṭaiyāḷum maṟaivāḻvu
m paṉuval vāḻvum Ivarkaḷil tevatātutti kku peṇmai Uṭan veruṅ kirtti maṇmicai vaḷarkkum kuyil Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷennum Alakil kaṟpil Aṟaneṟi maṭantai kirutti kuṇattāṟ ciṟantoṅkiaṟantaḻaippa Aruntutiyeṉa varum perumai Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷum perum pukaḻ mānaṭikaḷum Ūḻiyūḻi pala kaṟpil vāḻi maṇam puṇantiruppa Utaiyakiri Ucci Eṟi mativeṇkuṭaip putuniḻalkiḻ cantiramukamaṇṭala t(t)tāmarai pavaḷavāy
Intiranila �moḷiram paṭiṭṭana Icai pon virasiṅhāsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkara vattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4- Āvatu nāḷ 3 10 36- nāl jeyaṅ koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu Amparnāṭuṭ paṭayeviya tiruk kaṭavūr mahāsabhaiyom nammuril comattiyan kalaiyaṉ centan Ulakuṭaiya nāyanār tirumeṉi kalyāṇatirumeṉiyāka Ivvūril Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār rājarājīśvaramuṭaiyārkku Aṟccaṉāpokamāka Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta
nilamāvatu tiripuvaṉamātevivatikku kiḻakkum meṟkum Arumoḻi tevavāykkālukkut teṟkku kaṇṇāṟṟu 1- catirattu caṅkarakaṇṭanenṟu per kūvappaṭṭa viḷainilamuṅ kulaitiṭarum Oṭaikkum Ellaiyāvatu kaṭalāṭṭi Āṟṟukku meṟku veṇkāṭuteva vākkālukku vaṭakku Omayintaṉ Aṉannan vaṭukan nilattukku kiḻakku comattiyan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān kalaiyan nilattuk kum kaṭalāṭṭi Āṟṟukku naṭuvuḷppaṭṭa viḷainilam n=taṅapa-m Ivvellaiyil Akappaṭṭa kulaitiṭarum Oṭaiyum vikkirama tūrattavatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku 2- kaṇ catirattu kollaippaḷḷaviḷai nilam Iupa nakku veṇ
Ittevaṟku Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka nāṅkaḷ viṭṭamaiyil Innilaṅkaḷukkut tiruvācalil puṟappaṭṭa kuṭimai kaṭamai Epperppaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom . paṇiyāl Ivai Āyirantaiññūṟṟuvap piriyan Eḻuttu mahāsabhaikku camainta mokiliyan tiruveṇkāṭubhaṭṭa Agnicitaḥ mokiliyan tiruveṇkāṭubhaṭṭa sūno ragnicitta kratuyājinaḥ mokiliyan tiruveṇkāṭubhaṭṭa sūnoragnicidvājape
yayājinaḥ gautaman kumaran kaṇṇibhaṭṭa kāḍakasomayājinaḥ somatyan sadāśivan kumārabhaṭṭasya . gautaman dakṣiṇāmūttibhaṭṭasya gautaman Ārāvamutu cuntarattoḷuṭaiyānbhaṭṭa sya ..gautaman Ārāvamutu tevabhaṭṭasya ..mokiliyan tiruveṇkāṭubhaṭṭasūno ragnici[ taḥ] .. mokiliyan kāṭan candraśekharabhaṭṭasya mokiliyan tiruveṇkāṭubhaṭṭa Agnicinaḥ ..ātrayan nakkan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān coki Eḻuttu (uninscribed space) somatyan kalaiyan centan Eḻuttu somatyan tevan kalaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan nilanilan Eḻuttu mokiliyan pūtan tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Eḻuttu somatyan kalaiyan
tevaṉ Eḻuttu somatyan cantiracekaran centan Eḻuttu Omayintan kaṇṇan koṟṟan Eḻuttu mokiliyan kāṭan kāṭan Eḻuttu somatyan tevan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Omayintan nilan paṭaiyan Eḻuttu soma[ tyaṉ tirunāgi] śvaran centan Eḻuttu somatyan I dha kalaiyan kon Eḻuttu somatyan pāṇi vayitikattereṟi Eḻuttu somatyan ta centan Eḻuttu mokiliyan rā jentiracoḻan ta Eḻuttu somatyan tiruviraṭṭāṉa muṭaiyān kalaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan kaṇṇi nilan Eḻuttu somatyan tātan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu mokiliyan māṟan kalaiyan Eḻuttu Aratrayan tāmotiran vaikun—
tan Eḻuttu mokiliyan koṟṟan nilan Eḻuttu Omayintan koṟṟan cūriya tevan Eḻuttu somatyan puliyan nilan Eḻuttu somatyan viraṭṭan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu mokiliyan kāṭan Āḷuṭaiyān Eḻuttu mokiliyan kāṭanakkan Eḻuttu mokiliyan kāṭan kāṭan Eḻuttu somatyan kalaiyan paṭaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan śrīnantiśvaratevan Eḻuttu somatyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Omayintan pālai kalaiyan Eḻuttu Omayintan vaṭukan paṭaiyan Eḻuttu Omayintan tirukkaṟṟaḷi paṭaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan tevantevan Eḻuttu Omayintan kaṇṇi kalaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan tattan kalaiyan Eḻuttu somatyan
Iḷaiyatevan(k) kalaiyan Eḻuttu Omayintan tātan tātan Eḻuttu Omayintan nilan centan Eḻuttu pāratāyan nakkan tiruvāḷan Eḻuttu pāratāyan viṟṟiruntān pullan Eḻuttu mokiliyan nilan Eḻuttu mokiliyan pāṇi viraṭṭan Eḻuttu mokiliyan kumaran viraṭṭan Eḻuttu Omayintan pālaikāṭan Eḻuttu mokiliyan viraṭṭan viraṭṭan Eḻuttu somatyan centan tātan Eḻuttu mokiliyan koṇṭavilli kaṇṇi Eḻuttu somatyan marakatamalai pirāntakatevan Eḻuttu ....innāṭukku Ampūrnāṭṭup pāṇṭikulācaṉiccaruppetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Eṅkaḷūr naṭuviṟkoyil Utta tirumaṇṭapat
te kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiiruntu Innāṭu Eṅkaḷ vaṭaceriyāṉa tirukkaṭavūril Uṭaiyār rājarāja Īśvaramuṭaiyāṟkuc cantirātittavaṟ cāśvatika māka Iṟaiyiliyāka Innāyanār śrīpātattu nāṅkaḷ nirvāttukkuṭutta nilamāvatu śrīmattūrāntakavatikku meṟku jeṉaṉātavākkālukku vaṭakku 5- kaṇṇāṟṟu 2catirattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya Oṭaiyum Uṭaippu taramiliyāyk kiṭanta nilam say �na Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam ḍa�haru nāl virivu nilam pa� Innilam Āṟumāvum viḷai nilamākat tiruttik koṇṭaruḷakkaṭavatāka Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattukku tiruvācalil puṟappaṭṭa kuṭi
mai kaṭamai Epperppaṭṭutum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakkaṭavomāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Innilattukku Aḻivu niṉaippār nam vaṭacerikkum kūṟṟutaittaruḷiṉa śrīpātattukkum piḻaittārāvār . paṇiyāl Ivai Ivvū(r)ṟkāṇi Uṭaiya matyastan cannalamaṅkalamuṭaiyān periyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉāna Uttamappiriyan Eḻuttu Iruṅkaṇṭik koḷaiyapaṭṭan Eḻuttu kuṇṭur ciriḷaṅkoppaṭṭan Eḻuttu mantirattuc cuppira maṇṇiya paṭṭan Eḻuttu kuṇṭur sarvvatevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu kuṇṭur tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Eḻuttuḥuttirattu tiruveṇkāṭupaṭ
ṭan Eḻuttu nampūr colai Aracupaṭṭan Eḻuttu Iruṅkaṇṭic caṅkara nārāyaṇapaṭṭan Eḻuttu mantirattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭan Eḻuttu kantāṭaic colaippirān paṭṭan Eḻuttu Iruṅkaṇṭik kovintapaṭṭan Eḻuttu poṟpuṟattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Iruṅkaṇṭi nārāyaṇapaṭṭan Eḻuttu mantirattuc cūriya tevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu . ṣpace Innāṭṭu Ākkūrnā[.ṭ*]ṭut tirukkaṭavūril jivita muṭaiya śrīpātañcevikkum tiruppaḷḷittoṅkaluṭaiyārkaḷukkuc camainta kaṇkāṇi ceyvvārkaḷum kaiññāyakañ ceyvvārkaḷum paṭaittaḷavañ ceyvārkaḷum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr Uṭaiyār rājarāja Īśva
ramuṭaiyāṟku nāṅkaḷum nāyanār tirumeṉi kalliyāṇa tirumeṉiyāka Oru canti Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku nāṅkaḷ kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūril Eṅkaḷukku jivitamaṭaitta viracoḻa nallūril śrīmāṟkaṇṭaiya vatikkuk kiḻakku Irājentiracoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 1- kaṇṇāṟṟu 1catirattum 2 kaṇṇāṟṟu 1- catirattum nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa nilam paṉaṅkāṭṭukku melaikkollai Aṟutikku meṟku rājentiracoḻavākkālukku vaṭakkum kuṭukkinṟoṅkollaikkuk kiḻakkum tivakkāṟar kuṭiiruppukkup pukum vaḻikkut teṟku Inṉānku cimaiyilum naṭuvuḷ Uḷḷa menṟu perkūvappaṭṭa
taramili nilam n=tam viḷainilamāka tiruttikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākavum Iṅke kuṭi Iruppukkellai nilam 9m śantrātittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka kācu kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyili yāka Innāyanār śrī pātatte nirvārttuk kuṭuttom Innilattukku tiruvāca lil puṟappaṭṭa kuṭimai kaṭamai Epp(o)ṟpaṭṭutum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Inniyāmattukku camainta kaṇkāṇamcoḷen tiraciṅka koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu rājarājak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Aḻakiyacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu rājagampirak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu kulatipak koṟṟakkuṭai—
kkon Eḻuttu kulottuṅkacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu maṇṇaikoṇṭacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu paṉaiyūrnāṭṭuk koṟṟak kuṭaikkon Eḻuttu vikkiramaciṅkak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu miṉavan koṟṟakkuṭaikkoṉ Eḻuttu Uttamacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu kaṅkai koṇṭacoḻa koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu jayatuṅkak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu jaṉanātak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu rājamāttāṇṭa koṟṟakkuṭaik kon Eḻuttu caḷukkikulakālak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu maturāntakak koṟṟak kuṭaikkon Eḻuttu paṇṭita
coḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Apimāṉameruk koṟṟakkuṭaik kon Eḻuttu virarākkatak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu tiyākacamuttirak koṟṟak kuṭaikkon Eḻuttu rājaviccātirak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Acañcalak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu rājanārāyaṇak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu kali yāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Ulakuyyakkoṇṭa coḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Akaḷaṅkak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu vira māttāṇṭa koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu Ulakaḷantacoḻak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu coḻativākara koṟṟakkuṭaikkon
Eḻuttu coḻaviccātirak koṟṟakkuṭaikkon Eḻuttu ....innāṭṭuk kuṟumpūrnāṭṭu Aṉantamaṅkalamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻapurattu nakarattom Eṅkaḷūr Uṭaiyār tiruvaṉantiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil tirumaṇṭapatte kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu Eṅkaḷūr maṟuvum Orupūvum Ivvāṇṭu cāviyāyt taṭṭuppaṭṭu Iṟukka Oṇṇāmaiyil Ittaṭṭiṟaik kuṭalāka Eṅkaḷilicaintu Innāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭut tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār rājarāja Īśvaramuṭaiyā(r)ṟku mulaprityarāna Āticaṇṭe śvaratevaṟkku Innakarattuc cāliyanakarattom Ūr(ṟ)kiḻ kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyili yāka Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyiliceytu ku
ṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūril kiḷaitāṅkiccatirattukkuk kiḻakku paḷḷiyāṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkum meṟkum Ivvāṟṟil teṉkulaikku vaṭakku Innāṉku simaiyilum naṭuvuḷ varampaṟaiyāyp payiṟ ceyya Uṇṇātu pāḻkiṭanta taramilip paṭukaiyil śrīrājarājaṉenṟu tirunāmañ cāttiṉa nilamaḷavukolāl nūṟu kuḻikoṇṭatoru māvāka nilam vaupa Innilam Āṟumānilam viḷainilamāka kallit tiruttikkoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Orumānilam Itu kalli Eṟaṭṭa maṇṇilait tirunantavaṉamāvatākavum Ittevaṟku cantirātittavaṟ cāśvatikamākak kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta Innilattukku Iṟaikā
valāka Ikkoyilil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevarpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 3 10 7 Ikkācu muppatteḻuṅ koṇṭamaiyil Innilat tukku tiruvācalāl puṟappaṭṭa kuṭimai kaṭamai Epperppaṭṭutum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cempilum kallilum veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatāka [sa]m matitta Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom cāliyanakarattom . Ip piramāṇam Eḻutinen veḷkovaṉ Ālañceriya ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai komaruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Aṟampālaṉ Eḻuttu Uttamapālan Eḻuttu Aṉantapā
lan Eḻuttu taṟparamporuḷ mūvāyirattoruvan Eḻuttu Utanapālaṉ Eḻuttu śiyārur kūttaṉ sayiññai tevanuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu coman Āṭkoṇṭa villi Eḻuttu kūttan(m) kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu cāttaṉ periyān sayiññai Āṭkoṇṭāṉ Ulakamuṇṭāṉ sayiññai periyāṉ vaṭukan sayiññai kāman kūttan Eḻuttu veṇṇāṭaṉ cilampan Eḻuttu nakkaṉ ceyyāṉ Eḻuttu Uṭaiyāṉ Utaiyan Eḻuttu kāri māṟaṉ Utaiyañcetān Eḻuttu Aṉantaṉ nampi Eḻuttu kaṇavatinampi Eḻuttu niṉṟāṉ coṟaṉ sayiññai cūṟṟi tiru nākiciramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Utaiyan śiyārur Eḻuttu tiruvākkulamuṭaiyāṉ sayiññai
ceyyānakkaṉ Eḻuttu ciyārur tirunaṭṭamāṭi Eḻuttu veṇkāṭan kūttan sayiññai ḥ2 Ivvūr viyāpāra nakarattom Eṅkaḷur Uṭaiyār nitta vinotiśiramuṭaiyār koyilile kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Innāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu Amparṉāṭuṭ paṭa yeviya tirukaṭavūr Uṭaiyār Irājarāja Īśvara muṭaiyāṟku Aṟcaṉāpokamākak kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyākat tiruttip payiṟ cetukoḷḷakkaṭavutāka viṭṭa kollait taramili nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai comān kuṉṟukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tillaiyāḷinallūr Uṭaiyār tiru nākiśaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kuṭukkiṉṟom kollait taramili nilattukkuk kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai paḷḷiyāṟuninṟum tenkiḻakku nokkippona Āṟṟukkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta nānku simaiyilum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam nūṟukuḻi koṇṭa toru māvāka nilam valam kulaikku vaṭakkup paṭukai nilam Upam Āka nilam vaḍam Itu cūḻntakulaikaḷum nirpāyavum vāriyum Iṟaikkavum Uḷḷa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa Ittevaṟku Aṟcaṉāpokamāka ḷā Iṟaiyili cetukuṭuttu Innilattukku Ittevar śipaṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 10 8 Ikkācu patineṭṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Innilattukku Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici tiruvācalāl puṟappaṭṭa kuṭimai kaṭamai Eppeṟpaṭṭutum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Uṭaiyār śrikālakālatevar koyil tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭ ṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum
Ikkācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyili cetukuṭuttom Ivvaṉantamaṅkalamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻapurattu viyāpāranakarattom . Iviṟaiyilip piramāṇam Eḻutinen veṭkovan Ālañceriyuṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ivai viḷamaruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu marutuṭaiyāṉ periyāḻvān Eḻuttu vaippuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Uṭaikkalamuṭaiyāṉa Īcatevaṉ Eḻuttu vāṉ Eḻuttu Ālattuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Uyyavantān Eḻuttu nāyakan cuppan Eḻuttu Aṉpuṭaiyān Eḻuttu viḷamaruṭaiyāṉ Āticcatevan Eḻuttu kākkunāyakan sayiññai tenmaliyuṭaiyān paṉṟi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
